title: Rebuild 20 Discussion SPOILERS
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 2.0 Discussion [SPOILERS] Post by Lagann » Thu Jul 16, 2009 1:14 am Since the other thread turned into a translation thread I have no where to put this It looks like its confirmed eva 06 is the white moon giant. I also noticed that when Eva 01 was stomping on the NERV pyramid it reminded me a lot of the sandbox scene in EoE.

[]: Post by roblucci01 » Thu Jul 16, 2009 1:23 am Eva Unit- 06 looks exactly like Eva Unit-01 in the "Quickening" trailer.

[]: Post by xeon » Thu Jul 16, 2009 2:26 am What the hell did Kaoru mean by "i'm going to make you happy this time". All his scenes thus far are hinting at something about the world repeating itself over and over or wanting to invade Shinji's rectum.

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 16, 2009 2:41 am Do we really need another generic "2.0 Discussion Vomit Thread" that bloats into 50 pages in a week? [/hyperbole] Threads about actual specific subjects . Use them. Use the thread list to find them. Make new ones if they aren't already there. Sorry about the whole inconvenience of not being able to put all the random little things you want to say about 2.0 into single posts in single threads, but we've had enough of these monsters.
